audit_items.proof_trace: Data columns are added to cache during KZG verification (block_verification.rs:1324-1332) BEFORE state transition validation (per_block_processing at L1614-1629). When blocks fail state transition, their columns remain in cache. RPC handler serves cached columns without checking if the block passed state transition, violating the invariant.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends invalid block via RPC; KZG verification caches its data columns before state transition runs; block fails per_block_processing and is rejected; columns remain cached; honest peer requests DataColumnsByRoot and receives columns for the invalid block.
